title: Building a dashboard to show anything overdue and/or coming up due in 30 days
excerpt: I have multiple boards, each with multiple timeline and status columns for the various steps each item has to go through. I’d like to create a dashboard that “looks” at all of the boards and shows me anything that is pas…

posts.author: JSMaxwell (Jason Maxwell)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have multiple boards, each with multiple timeline and status columns for the various steps each item has to go through. I’d like to create a dashboard that “looks” at all of the boards and shows me anything that is past due (as indicated by the timeline end date having passed but it not being marked Done in the status column) as well as anything that is coming up due in the next 30 days (as indicated by the timeline end date coming up in the next 30 days).

I can’t seem to configure this with the given widgets. Any thoughts?

Thank you.

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JSMaxwell if a 3rd party add-on is an option, the Analytics & Reports by Screenful can produce such reports across any number of monday boards. You can create a task list and filter it by e.g. “Overdue”, “Due within 30 days”, “Completed overdue” etc. You can set it up to look at any of your Date or Timeline columns in your boards. Here’s an example chart:

Charts+Screenshot+71000×608 224 KB

These task lists can be embedded to monday dashboards, and/or scheduled to be sent automatically to selected recipients via email.

We have a 21 days free trial so you can give it a try. I’d be happy to help you to set up these reports.

posts.author: Valeriia.H (Valeriia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, community! If you’re looking for a dashboard that consolidates overdue and upcoming tasks across multiple boards, Time In Status* can help enhance your tracking and visualization.

image1920×960 117 KB

How Time In Status Can Help:

Track Overdue Items Automatically – The Time In Status board records how long an item has spent in each stage, allowing you to easily filter tasks that are past due but not marked as Done.

Identify Upcoming Due Dates – By tracking time in workflow statuses, you can create a report that highlights tasks approaching their deadlines within the next 30 days.

Seamless Dashboard Integration – While Time In Status has its own reports, you can export the data or connect it to Monday.com’s dashboards to build visual widgets for overdue and upcoming tasks.

Available both as board and as integration.

Start the 14-days free trial to try it out for yourself and share your experience with us.

Hope you find this app helpful,
Valeriia
